title: UserInterfaceGeneralEventHandler Object
description: The UserInterfaceGeneralEventHandler is a client implemented class that can be added as a handler to a UserInterfaceGeneralEvent event and which is triggered when the event is fired.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

notify.title: UserInterfaceGeneralEventHandler.notify Method
notify.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: Returns an object that provides access to additional information associated with the event.
